title: Capgemini: Refactoring a Data Warehouse to Amazon Redshift

description:
Capgemini joins us to discuss an architecture that adheres to HIPPA compliancy for a life sciences customer and speaks to the security implications around their IBM Netezza migration to Amazon Redshift. In their approach, they use an ELT tool installed on auto-scaled EC2 instances to perform transformation and incremental loading of 20TB into 450 tables.
